# 727a8.org

> Educational resource about Chapter 7 discharge eligibility under 11 U.S.C. Section 727(a)(8).

727a8.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the Chapter 7 discharge bar. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://727a8.org/: Guide to the 8-year waiting period between Chapter 7 discharges

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
